name: Alarm
description: You touch an object or area up to near-sized to set a magical alarm. You instantly know when a creature touches or enters the warded area.

name: Burning Hands
description: You unleash a circle of flame from your hands. Choose a target within close range. It takes 1d6 damage.

name: Charm Person
description: You beguile one humanoid of LV 2 or less. It treats you as a trusted friend for the duration, but knows it was charmed afterward.

name: Detect Magic
description: You sense the presence of magic within near range. The GM tells you the location but not the nature of each magical aura you sense.

name: Feather Fall
description: You slow your rate of descent to land safely if you fall.

name: Floating Disk
description: You create a magical floating disk of force that follows you. The disk carries up to 20 gear slots of equipment and hovers at waist height.

name: Hold Portal
description: You hold a door, gate, or portal closed. A creature trying to open it must make a STR check vs. your spellcasting check.

name: Light
description: One object you touch glows with bright light that fills a near distance. Touch it again to end the spell.

name: Mage Armor
description: Your armor class becomes 14 (18 on a critical spellcasting check).

name: Magic Missile
description: You fire a glowing bolt that hits a target of your choice. It deals 1d4 damage. You make the spellcasting check with advantage.

name: Protection from Evil
description: Chaotic beings have disadvantage on attack rolls and hostile spellcasting checks against the target. These beings also can't possess, compel, or beguile the target. When cast on an already-possessed target, the possessing entity makes a CHA check vs. the last spellcasting check. On a failure, the entity is expelled.

name: Sleep
description: You weave a lulling spell that fills a near-sized cube extending from you. Choose a number of living creatures in the area up to your level. Those creatures fall into a deep sleep if they are LV 2 or less. Vigorous shaking or being injured wakes them.

name: Acid Arrow
description: A corrosive bolt of acid hits one target. The target takes 1d6 damage, and continues to take 1d6 damage each round while the spell is focused.

name: Alter Self
description: Your body takes on new features. Choose one: water-breathing, natural weapons (d6 damage), darkvision, or non-humanoid appearance.

name: Detect Thoughts
description: You detect the surface thoughts of one creature within range. Each round you maintain focus, the GM tells you the creature's immediate thoughts.

name: Fixed Object
description: An object you touch weighing up to 5 lbs becomes fixed in its current position. Nothing can move it while focused.

name: Hold Person
description: You paralyze one humanoid creature of LV 4 or less. It is aware but can't take actions or move while focused.

name: Invisibility
description: A creature you touch becomes invisible for the duration. The spell ends if the target attacks or casts a spell.

name: Knock
description: A door, gate, or other portal instantly opens, defeating mundane locks. The sound of opening can be heard at far range.

name: Levitate
description: You float a near distance vertically per round. You can hold yourself in place by grabbing something solid.

name: Mirror Image
description: You create a number of illusory duplicates equal to half your level (minimum 1). Attackers must randomly determine which image to target. Duplicates are destroyed when targeted.

name: Misty Step
description: You teleport a near distance to an unoccupied space you can see.

name: Silence
description: You magically mute sound in a near cube within the spell's range. Creatures inside are deafened, and any sounds they create cannot be heard.

name: Web
description: You create a near-sized cube of sticky, dense spider web within range. A creature stuck in the web can't move and must succeed on a Strength check vs. your spellcasting check to free itself.

name: Animate Dead
description: You touch the remains of a humanoid creature, animating it as a skeleton or zombie under your control. The undead obeys simple commands.

name: Dispel Magic
description: You end one spell affecting a target you can see within range.

name: Fabricate
description: You turn raw materials into a finished work. The work can be as complex as a lockbox or simple furniture.

name: Fireball
description: You hurl a tiny bead of fire that erupts at a point within range. All creatures within a near-sized cube of that point take 4d6 damage.

name: Fly
description: You can fly a near distance per round. You can hover in place.

name: Gaseous Form
description: You and your gear transform into a cloud of smoke. You can move a near distance each round and fit through small gaps.

name: Illusion
description: You create a convincing visible and audible illusion that fills a near-sized cube within range. Creatures who interact with it make an INT check vs. your spellcasting check to disbelieve.

name: Lightning Bolt
description: You shoot a ray of lightning from your hands. All creatures in a straight line out to far distance take 3d6 damage.

name: Magic Circle
description: You conjure a rune circle preventing a chosen creature type from attacking anyone inside the circle.

name: Protection from Energy
description: One creature you touch becomes impervious to the wild fury of the elements. Choose fire, cold, or electricity. The target is immune to harm from energy of the chosen type.

name: Sending
description: You send a brief mental message to any creature with whom you are familiar who is on the same plane.

name: Speak with Dead
description: A dead body you touch answers your questions in a distant, wheezing voice. You can ask up to three yes or no questions (one at a time). If cast more than once in 24 hours, treat a failed spellcasting check as a critical failure.

name: Freeze
description: One creature is hit by a freezing cold energy and cannot move until the end of their next turn.

name: Ghostly Armour
description: The caster can only be damaged by silvered or magical weapons and spells.

name: Haunt
description: The target is haunted by cosmic horrors and cannot gain the benefits of a Rest.

name: Hunger of Oedinn
description: A column of gnashing teeth comes out of the caster's hand and deals 2d6 damage.

name: Necrotic Armour
description: The target's AC goes up by 3. Whenever a melee weapon attack hits the target, the attacker's blood comes out of their orifices in red mist form and they lose 1d4 HP.

name: Summon Undead
description: The caster summons one undead creature that obeys them. The Level of the summoned undead depends on the Tier the spell is cast at (Tier 1-5). The tier must be declared before casting. The caster cannot have more than one summoned undead at the same time.
_note: Variable tier spell (1-5); tier here represents minimum tier

name: Fire Bolt
description: A bolt of fire strikes one target within near range for 1d6 damage.

name: Blinding Flash
description: A burst of white light erupts. One target makes a CON save (DC 12) or is blinded for 1d4 rounds.

name: Globe of Daylight
description: A floating orb of bright light illuminates a near-sized area. You can move it up to near each round as a free action.

name: Sense Magic
description: You detect the presence and location of all active magic within near range.

name: Repel Animals
description: Natural animals of 2 HD or fewer will not willingly approach you for the duration.

name: Shadow Cloak
description: You blend into shadows and dim light. Advantage on stealth checks while in low-light conditions.

name: Chill Touch
description: Ice-cold energy deals 1d4 damage to one creature you touch. That creature cannot regain HP until the start of your next turn.

name: Force Shield
description: A barrier of unseen force grants you +3 AC until the start of your next turn.

name: Ventriloquism
description: You project your voice to appear to come from any point within near range.

name: Befuddle
description: One creature of LV 2 or less becomes too confused to act. It can only move on its turn for the duration.

name: Fireball (Lesser)
description: Fire erupts in a close-sized area within far range. All creatures inside take 2d6 damage.

name: Levitate
description: You float vertically a near distance per round and can hold yourself in place by grabbing something solid.

name: Invisibility
description: A creature you touch becomes invisible. Ends if they attack or cast a spell.

name: Wink-Out
description: You teleport to any unoccupied space within near range you can see.

name: Fear
description: One creature makes a WIS save (DC 12) or flees from you for 1d4 rounds.

name: Carpet of Adhesion
description: A near-sized floor area becomes supernaturally sticky. Creatures inside make a STR save (DC 12) each round or cannot move.

name: Fireball
description: A bead of fire erupts in a near-sized area within far range. All creatures inside take 4d6 damage.

name: Fly
description: You fly a near distance per round.

name: Dispel Magic
description: You end one active spell on a target you can see within near range.

name: Paralysis
description: One humanoid of LV 4 or less is paralyzed. They are aware but cannot act while focused.

name: Lightning Arc
description: A bolt of lightning shoots from your hands in a straight line to far range. All creatures in the line take 3d6 damage.
